---
applyTo: "docs/**/*.md,README.md,MEMORY.md"
---


# Docs and Memory

Docs must match tested behavior.

Use:
- `docs/ENGINEERING_MANIFEST.md` for priorities and acceptance criteria
- `docs/AGENT_SYNC.md` for current state
- `docs/decision_log.md` for architecture/API decisions
- `docs/scope_backlog.md` for useful out-of-scope ideas

Do not let clarifications remain chat-only. Persist scope clarifications in the right doc before implementing.

Do not rewrite large docs for style unless requested.
